user.title: TTN JSON — Device
user.description: Enter your TTN device ID and uplink MQTT topic. Use `<EUI>` as a placeholder for the device ID in the topic.

listen.title: TTN JSON — Waiting for a Message
listen.description:
Listening on:
`{topic}`

Trigger an uplink from **{eui}** now (send a message, press a button, etc.), then check the box and click Submit.

data.ready: I've triggered an uplink from the device

pick_fields.title: TTN JSON — Select Fields
pick_fields.description: Found {count} fields in the uplink payload. Select the ones you want as Home Assistant sensor entities.

assign_units.title: TTN JSON — Assign Units
assign_units.description:
Assign a unit of measurement to each selected field. Units have been pre-filled where recognised — edit as needed.

{fields}

selects.title: TTN JSON — Mode Select Entities (optional)
selects.description:
Add select entities for **{eui}** to send uint8 mode commands as downlinks.

Format — one block per select, separated by a blank line:

  name=mode
  f_port=1
  state_path=uplink_message/decoded_payload/mode
  AUTO:0
  STOW:1

Leave blank to skip.

error.mqtt_unavailable: MQTT integration is not available. Please configure MQTT first.
error.no_message: No message received yet. Trigger an uplink from the device and try again.
error.empty_payload: Message received but no fields could be extracted. Check your TTN payload formatter.
error.no_fields_selected: Please select at least one field.
error.bad_values: Could not parse sensor fields. Use  path/to/field:unit  one per line.
error.empty_values: At least one sensor field is required.
error.duplicate_eui: A device with this EUI is already configured.
error.bad_selects: Could not parse select definitions. Check the format shown in the description.

abort.already_configured: This device EUI is already configured.

error.empty_values: At least one sensor field is required.
